scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const ok=['vite','vue','axios'].every(p=>{try{fs.accessSync('node_modules/'+p+'/package.json');return true}catch{return false}});if(!ok){console.error('依赖不完整，将尝试 npm install');process.exit(1)}" || npm install
scripts.sync:backend-mock-json: node --input-type=module -e "import { writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'fs'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'url'; const u = pathToFileURL('./src/data/recommendMock.js').href; const m = await import(u); const out = '../campus-diet-backend/src/main/resources/bootstrap/mock-recipes.json'; mkdirSync('../campus-diet-backend/src/main/resources/bootstrap', { recursive: true }); writeFileSync(out, JSON.stringify(m.MOCK_RECIPES, null, 2), 'utf8'); console.log('wrote', out, m.MOCK_RECIPES.length, 'items');"
